\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
\subsubsection*{template$<$class Type$>$\newline
class Gauss\+Quad$<$ Type $>$}
Gaussian-\/quadrature helpers for Green\textquotesingle{}s functions and incident fields. 


\begin{DoxyTemplParams}{Template Parameters}
{\em Type} & either a Green\textquotesingle{}s function provider or an incident‑field class exposing the member functions described in the file header.\\
\hline
\end{DoxyTemplParams}
\begin{DoxyNote}{Note}
The implementation uses {\bfseries{centroid evaluation}} (first order) for the inner integrals {\ttfamily I1}, {\ttfamily I2}, {\ttfamily I4}, {\ttfamily I5}, which is consistent with the low‑order RWG discretization and the JOSA B Vol 26 No 4 2009 first‑order formulas referenced in the code comments below. 
\end{DoxyNote}


Definition at line \mbox{\hyperlink{GaussQuad_8h_source_l00048}{48}} of file \mbox{\hyperlink{GaussQuad_8h_source}{Gauss\+Quad.\+h}}.
